message:
fix(core,rerank): harden percentile_sorted and tensor shape casting

metrics_eval: replace debug_assert(!sorted.is_empty()) with runtime
early-return guard in percentile_sorted(), preventing potential panic
from usize underflow on empty slices in release builds.

rerank: replace unchecked `as i64` casts for ONNX tensor shape with
i64::try_from() returning SearchError::RerankFailed on overflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
